message:
fix(security,supply-chain,vef): replace stubs with real implementations and harden edge cases

Eleven files across security, supply-chain, vef, runtime, and scripts:

- update_copilot: derive history_depth from real dependency count and
  fan-out metrics instead of hardcoded 0.7
- isolation_backend: probe_oci_runtime() checks for docker/podman/nerdctl
  via PATH lookup instead of hardcoded false
- sybil_defense: clamp trim_ratio to [0.0, 0.5] instead of accepting
  any finite value
- quarantine: propagation_status eviction uses oldest timestamp
  (min_by_key) instead of arbitrary BTreeMap first key; test adjusted
  for Critical severity
- reputation: NaN weight_override falls back to default weight via
  .filter(|w| w.is_finite()) instead of returning an error
- proof_verifier: explicitly reject future-dated proofs (generated_at
  > now) with distinct message; new test future_proof_produces_deny
- verifier_economy: replay capsule eviction uses oldest issued_at
  timestamp with capsule_id tiebreak instead of arbitrary HashMap key;
  new test verifies eviction order
- lane_scheduler: new test confirms partial policy validity when
  mappings are consistent
- compat_gate: mode transitions verify from_mode matches actual
  current mode before approving
- check_retrievability_gate.py: check lib.rs instead of main.rs;
  updated test name expectations
- check_verifier_economy.py: updated expected guard pattern for
  canonical key variable name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,10 +41,14 @@ def run_checks() -> list[dict]:
         mod_src = f.read()
     checks.append(_check("module registered in storage/mod.rs", "pub mod retrievability_gate;" in mod_src))
 
-    # Storage module registered in main.rs
-    with open(MAIN_RS) as f:
-        main_src = f.read()
-    checks.append(_check("storage module in main.rs", "pub mod storage;" in main_src))
+    # Storage module registered in lib.rs
+    LIB_RS = os.path.join(ROOT, "crates/franken-node/src/lib.rs")
+    if os.path.exists(LIB_RS):
+        with open(LIB_RS) as f:
+            lib_src = f.read()
+        checks.append(_check("storage module in lib.rs", "pub mod storage;" in lib_src))
+    else:
+        checks.append(_check("storage module in lib.rs", False, "lib.rs missing"))
 
     with open(IMPL) as f:
         src = f.read()
@@ -112,7 +116,8 @@ def run_checks() -> list[dict]:
         "test_hash_mismatch_emits_failure_event",
         "test_hash_mismatch_records_receipt",
         "test_latency_exceeded_blocks",
-        "test_latency_at_limit_passes",
+        "test_latency_at_limit_is_rejected",
+        "test_latency_below_limit_passes",
         "test_unreachable_target_blocks",
         "test_unregistered_target_blocks",
         "test_eviction_succeeds_with_proof",
